description: Cross-surface navigation malformed input fixture — invalid params that must be rejected

scenarios.name: XSS attempt in value
scenarios.note: Parser returns the raw value; sanitization is the consumer's responsibility. Parser itself does not reject.

scenarios.name: SQL injection attempt in value
scenarios.note: Parser returns the raw value. BFF must parameterize queries.

scenarios.name: empty value string
scenarios.note: Empty value is treated as missing — parser returns null

scenarios.name: mode with extra whitespace
scenarios.note: URLSearchParams preserves whitespace; Zod enum rejects ' device-id '
